rationale: Educ. Code §44.042 governs school district purchasing preferences for agricultural products. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A school district that purchases agricultural products shall give preference to those produced, processed, or grown in this state if the cost to the school district is equal and the quality is equal.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses agricultural product purchasing preferences and is unrelated to homestead exemption appraised value thresholds.
